overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a desert highway scene in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), starting from roadside barriers outside a futuristic city, crossing the road, passing under large billboards, and exploring the arid wasteland with abandoned vehicles and distant mountains under a bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway roadside with concrete barriers

events.description: blue and white pickup truck drives past on the highway
dark sedan passes by on the road
green sports car speeds past on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the roadside next to red and white concrete barriers, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck driving along the highway
green sports car speeding down the road

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete traffic barriers lining the roadside
multi-lane asphalt highway with white lane markings
futuristic teal and white advertising blimp floating above the city
tall industrial control tower with satellite dishes
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a desert highway with the camera walking alongside concrete barriers. Several vehicles pass by on the road while a futuristic blimp hovers over the distant city skyline. The environment is bright and arid with sparse vegetation.

events.description: pink sedan drives along the highway
white vehicle passes on the road
begin crossing the highway from the roadside toward the desert billboard structures

agents.ego_description: leaving the roadside barriers and crossing the multi-lane highway toward the large billboard gantry

notable_agents.action: pink sedan driving along the highway

entered.detail: large yellow billboard with MAXTAC advertisement showing armed figures
red billboard with CIRRUS branding and star logo
large metal framework supporting the billboards over the road

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the highway, leaving the concrete barriers behind, and approaches a massive billboard gantry structure. Two large advertisements for MAXTAC and CIRRUS become prominent on the left as traffic continues to pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wasteland passing under billboard gantry

events.description: passing under the large billboard gantry structure
terrain changes from asphalt roadside to sandy desert ground with cacti

agents.ego_description: walking through the desert terrain under the billboard structure, heading toward an abandoned truck visible in the distance

entered.detail: large black military-style truck with yellow star emblem, abandoned in the desert
tall saguaro cacti and desert vegetation scattered across the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: Passing under the billboard gantry, the scene transitions to open desert terrain. The asphalt road is left behind as the camera moves onto sandy ground with desert vegetation. An abandoned military truck becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep desert with abandoned vehicle and mountain views

events.description: passing the abandoned military truck on the left side
distant vehicle visible driving on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing through the desert past the abandoned truck, heading toward the distant mountains and city skyline

entered.detail: large rocky mountain range visible in the far distance beyond the desert

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the abandoned truck and continues deeper into the desert wasteland. The city skyline shifts to the left as the camera advances, with mountains now visible ahead. Sparse cacti dot the landscape and the highway remains visible in the distance to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a busy roadside corridor into the desolate expanse of a sun-drenched desert wasteland. It begins by walking alongside concrete barriers on a bright highway, where vehicles stream past and a futuristic blimp hovers over a distant city skyline. As the camera crosses the road, the scene shifts toward a massive billboard gantry featuring prominent advertisements for MAXTAC and CIRRUS. Passing under the structure, the asphalt gives way to sandy ground and sparse vegetation, leading the camera toward an abandoned military truck. The movement finally pushes deeper into the arid terrain, leaving the highway behind as the city skyline recedes to the left and rugged mountains emerge on the horizon.
